chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT LARKANA Present: Shamsuddin Abbasi, J. Agha Faisal, J. C.P D-854 of 2018: Saddam Hussain Abbasi vs. S.S.P. Larkana and others. For the Petitioner: Mr. Ghulam Ali Abbasi, Advocate For Official Respondents: Mr. Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, Additional Advocate General, Sindh. Date of hearing: 07.05.2024 Date of Order: 07.05.2024 ORDER Agha Faisal, J. The petitioner seeks appointment on deceased quota and it is the respondents’ case that he may apply at the time when vacancies are advertised and that his case shall be considered in due accordance with the law. No cavil is articulated by the petitioner’s counsel in such regard, therefore, the petition is disposed off in such terms accordingly. Judge Judge
